props.ChoiceText: The overseer noticed you and began handing you jobs that paid slightly better and cost much more.
props.ChoiceBio: An overseer's attention made your labor more visible and your future less fixed.

0.TransitionText: Because an overseer's attention made your labor more visible and your future less fixed, rough work taught your hands enough to seek something more skilled.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Craftsman, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because an overseer's attention made your labor more visible and your future less fixed, your life remained one of burden, wages, and endurance.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Laborer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because an overseer's attention made your labor more visible and your future less fixed, labor carried you onto another hard road.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.
